titleStmt.title: SII 23.273: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 273. (A.R. No. 273 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—on the same base Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 7; 340th day

summary.p: The inscription begins with praśasti Pūmālai miḍaindu etc. This is the uḷvari document giving effect to the orders recorded in No. 272 above, by entering the lands in the Tax Registers as tax-free, and getting the charter engraved on stone. It is signed at the end by seven revenue officers, three of them known as Puravuvari-tiṇaikkaḷa-Nāyakam and the other four, Puravuvaritiṇaikkaḷa-Mugaveṭṭi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kalveṭṭuppaṭi . pūmālai miṭaittu poṉmālait tikaḻn tiruppa pāmālai malarntu parumaṇittiraḷpuyattirunilamaṭantai yoṭuja ḷḷiruppa peruvarai ntenappe tirumakaḷ Oru taṉi yiruppa kalaimakaḷ coṟtiṟam puṇirnta kaṟpiṉaḷāki viruppoṭu nāva kattiruppa ticaitoṟu tikiriyoṭu ceṅkol naṭappa Akila puvaṉaṅka vippator putumatipol veṇkuṭaimimicai niḻaṟṟak kārkali ṭap pavum kuḷatti
ṭait teliṅka micaiyeṟavum kaliṅkapūmiyaik kanaleri parukavum Aimpaṭaipparuvattu cempaṭaitāṅki veṅkaimaṇṭalat tāṅki nitiruttu vaṭaticai teṉticait tarumamum tavamum tāṉamum taḻaippa vetamum meymmaiyum Ātiyulakampolt talaitalaic ntaruḷi velaṟ karum poṟpuliyāṇai pārttivar cūṭa niṟaimaṇi makuṭam muṟaimai yiṟ cūṭi maṉṉuyirkkellām Iṉṉuyirt tāypol tiṇṇoḷi parappit tanittani parantu maṇmuḻutum kaḷippa maṉuneṟi vaḷarttut taṉ koyil koṟṟavācalpuṟattu maṇiṉāvoṭuṅka vicaiyamum pukaḻum melmel Oṅka
c ceḻiyar veñcuram pukac ceralar kaṭalpuka Aḻitaru ciṅkaḷar Añ ci lam ṅkar tiraiyiṭak kaṉṉaṭar veṉṉiṭak koṅka rotuṅkak ka ṇar cāya maṟṟetticai maṉṉarum tantamakkaraṇeṉat tirumalarc cevaṭi Urimaiyiliṟaiñcit tol kuṉ toḻuteḻat toṉṟiya mullaivāṇikai mukkokkiḻāṉaṭi Umaiyoṭu caṅkaraṉ Imaiyat tiruntaṉeṉap porunti Uṭaṉiruppa Āṅkavaṉ makiḻuṅ kaṅkaiyop pāki terivaiyartilatam tiyākapatākai purikuḻal maṭappiṭi punita kuṇavanitai tiripuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷivaṉ tiruviḷḷat taruḷat taraṇimuḻu
tumuṭaiyāḷeṉa Uṭaniruppa cempoṉ virasimhāsanattu mukkok kiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesari[ panmarāṉa] tribhuvana cakravarttikaḷ śrīvikramacoḷadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 7Āvatu nāḷ muṉnūṟṟu nāṟpatiṉāl tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikkum paḻamper tavirttapaṭikkum Uḷvari . Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭai yārkku veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatākap paḻamper tavirntu yāṇṭu Eḻāvatumutal tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭi Uyyak koṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimurnāṭṭu brahmadeyam vaṇṇak kuṭiyāṉa tyāgasamudraca
turvedimaṅkalam tiruvulakaḷanteṟina nilam Uṭpaṭa nilam toṇṇūṟ ṟoṉpate mukkāle Orumā mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyiṉāl ne rattu Aiññūṟṟu Aṟupatiṉ kalane patakkukku niccayitta nel Aiyyā yiratteḻunūṟṟut toṇṇūṟṟaiṅkalane patakku muppatteṭṭā vatu niccayitta nel raājakecariyāl Aiyyāyirattut toḷā yirattut toṇṇūṟṟuk kalane Irutūṇikkum Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷaṉāyakam kūṭalūruṭaiyā neḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaik kaḷaṉāyakam neṉmali kiḻāneḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷaṉāya kam neṟkuppaiyuṭaiyāṉ neḻuttu
Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi Ulakaveḷā neḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi mukantanūruṭaiyā neḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi civakuṉṟaṅkiḻā neḻuttu Ivai purovari tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi nelvāyiluṭaiyā neḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.273 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
